Blocks.Content:
The value of a variable can be changed.

This is one of the main reasons
why they are called variables.

You can put a new value
into the same variable.

First the variable `score` gets the value 10.

Then a new value 20 is assigned to it.

The old value is replaced by the new one.

Now the variable stores the number 20.

Blocks.content: Retype this code and check it.

Try to change the value of a variable.

Create a variable age
and first store the number 18 in it.

Then change the value to 21.

Type the code yourself using the example above.

Blocks.Content: When a new value is assigned to a variable, the old value disappears.
